---
applyTo: .github/apm/knowledge/**
---

# Knowledge base instructions

You are working inside the Cognitive Hub's foundational knowledge base.

## Structure

| Folder | Content |
|--------|---------|
| `.github/apm/knowledge/constitution/` | Core principles — greenfield, brownfield, enterprise defaults |
| `.github/apm/knowledge/governance/` | Architecture, security, observability, and testing guardrails |
| `.github/apm/knowledge/playbooks/` | Step-by-step delivery playbooks for different work types |
| `.github/apm/knowledge/examples/` | Sample specifications for reference |

## Editing rules

- Keep entries concise and opinionated — these are guardrails, not essays.
- Prefer bullets over prose.
- Each file should cover one concern.
- These files are referenced by agents and skills — changes affect hub behavior.
